actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && rfkill unblock wlan || rfkill block wlan'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(rfkill list wlan | grep "Soft blocked: no") ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && rfkill unblock bluetooth || rfkill block bluetooth'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(rfkill list bluetooth | grep "Soft blocked: no") ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && pactl set-source-mute @DEFAULT_SOURCE@ 0 || pactl set-source-mute @DEFAULT_SOURCE@ 1'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(pactl get-source-mute @DEFAULT_SOURCE@) == "Mute: no" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && swaymsg output \* dpms on || swaymsg output \* dpms off'
